hero.name: Byungwook Heo
hero.title: Customer Success Manager
hero.subtitle: I drive sustainable customer value through enterprise onboarding, expansion, and renewal.

about.heading: About
about.description_1: I have worked across pre-sales and customer success in enterprise B2B environments, focusing on helping customers realize measurable outcomes after product adoption.
about.description_2: I worked in pre-sales for financial and enterprise customers at AhnLab and OpenBase, and now serve as a Customer Success Manager in IBM's HashiCorp organization.
about.description_3: My strength is connecting customer, technical, and sales stakeholders across onboarding, adoption, renewal, and expansion to build long-term partnerships.

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: I am open to conversations about customer success, pre-sales, and B2B collaboration.

footer.built_with: Built with Next.js · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS
